description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 4 mins. His WakaTime activity was split across Java, Other, and Markdown, and it covered 5 projects. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories recorded this week.
